title: Sealapack Drawstring Refuse Sacks 12 Pack
features: NEATLY TIED UP: Sealapack Drawstring Bin liners are perfect for efficiently clearing waste. When full simply pull the drawstring and everything is closed in and ready to dispose of.
LARGE CAPACITY: Sealapack Drawstring Bin liners are large enough to hold 50 litres of household waste. Easy to use, suitable for use around the kitchen, office or garden.
STRONG & STURDY: Manufactured to fit a household waste bin and hold a large 50L of rubbish, perfect for a busy kitchen or catering unit
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: READY TO USE ROLL OF 15 BAGS
